description: This week's changelog discusses recent changes in Solana, including an outage that affected slot confirmations [t=13:28]. Future updates are planned, including a testnet downgrade to match the mainnet beta version [t=59:42]. A proposal for application fees during network congestion is highlighted, aimed at reducing spam transactions [t=112:61]. The release of a new Solana Verifiable builds CLI tool is also covered, enhancing code verification for users [t=225:51]. Updates to the Solana test validator and Geyser interface are mentioned, improving performance and usability [t=309:54].
topic_summary: Recent updates in Solana include addressing an outage, upcoming changes to the testnet, a proposal for application fees, the introduction of a Verifiable builds CLI tool, and improvements to the test validator and Geyser interface.
